items.headline: RBI Governor indicates no near-term inflation target increase, potential for long-term reduction
items.summary: RBI Governor Sanjay Malhotra stated India is unlikely to raise its inflation target soon and may consider a long-term reduction. He highlighted the current framework's success in lowering average inflation and improving macroeconomic stability. India's inflation is projected to rise but stay below 4%, with robust 7.2% GDP growth for FY27 and a decadal low GNPA ratio of 2.8%. The government maintained the 4% inflation target for the next five years.

items.headline: Indian markets poised for positive start on global cues and lower crude oil prices
items.summary: Indian markets are expected to open positively due to favorable global cues and crude oil prices dropping to $70/barrel, helped by US-Iran talks. However, Asia-Pacific markets traded lower, mirroring Wall Street's losses, with South Korea's Kospi significantly down. US markets closed lower due to chip stock divestment, though futures were mixed.

items.headline: JTL Industries reports strong operational growth in Q1 FY27
items.summary: JTL Industries reported strong operational growth in the Q1 FY27 earnings season.

items.headline: V2 Retail demonstrates strong operational growth in Q1 FY27
items.summary: V2 Retail demonstrated strong operational growth with standalone revenue climbing 58.25% year-on-year in the Q1 FY27 earnings season.

items.headline: Indian Bank reports strong Q1 FY27 operational growth
items.summary: Indian Bank reported strong operational growth in Q1 FY27. Specifically, gross advances increased 13.9% YOY and total deposits increased 13.3% YOY.

items.headline: Canara Bank reports strong Q1 FY27 operational growth
items.summary: Canara Bank reported strong operational growth in Q1 FY27. Specifically, global advances surged 18.0% YOY and global deposits grew 11.7% YOY.

items.headline: Punjab & Sind Bank reports strong Q1 FY27 operational growth
items.summary: Punjab & Sind Bank reported strong operational growth in the Q1 FY27 earnings season.

items.headline: Dhanlaxmi Bank reports 21.12% total business growth in June 2026 quarter
items.summary:
Dhanlaxmi Bank reported a 21.12% year-on-year growth in total business, reaching 
₹35,188 crore for the June 2026 quarter.

items.headline: Uhm Vacation results scheduled for July 2, 2026
items.summary: Uhm Vacation has its audited Q1 FY27 results scheduled for today, July 2, 2026.

items.headline: KPIT Technologies anticipates lower Q1FY27 revenues and margin pressure
items.summary: KPIT Technologies anticipates lower Q1FY27 revenues due to adjustments by European OEMs, with margins likely to face near-term pressure.

items.headline: Gems and Jewellery, Shipbuilding, and Sugar sectors show highest market cap increases
items.summary: On Wednesday, the Gems and Jewellery, Shipbuilding, and Sugar sectors recorded the highest increases in market capitalization.

items.headline: IT sector faces weak demand; Infosys and HCL Technologies may lower guidance
items.summary: IT stocks are facing a challenging period, with Motilal Oswal projecting weak demand and suggesting that Infosys and HCL Technologies might lower their FY27 guidance.

items.headline:
Coal India secures 
₹2,831 crore solar power project
items.summary:
Coal India has secured a Letter of Award valued at 
₹2,831.11 crore for a 600 MW solar power project in Uttar Pradesh.

items.headline: Bharti Airtel's Airtel Money begins NBFC operations
items.summary: Bharti Airtel's subsidiary, Airtel Money, has initiated its commercial operations as a Type II Non-Deposit accepting Non-Banking Financial Company (NBFC).

items.headline: Medi Assist Healthcare Services acquires additional 31.75% stake in Mayfair
items.summary: Medi Assist Healthcare Services finalized the acquisition of an additional 31.75% stake in Mayfair.

items.headline: CSM Technologies to debut on stock market today after successful IPO
items.summary:
CSM Technologies is set to debut on the stock market today, following a successful Initial Public Offering (IPO) that raised 
₹146 crore.

items.headline: Lloyds Enterprises to trade ex-dividend today
items.summary: Lloyds Enterprises will trade ex-dividend today.

items.headline: Chembond Material Technologies to trade ex-dividend today
items.summary: Chembond Material Technologies will trade ex-dividend today.

items.headline: Gujarat Energy to trade ex-date for spin-off today
items.summary: Gujarat Energy will trade ex-date for a spin-off today.

items.headline: Devyani International increases stake in Restaurants Development Co. (Thailand) to 56.7%
items.summary: Devyani International completed an additional investment in Restaurants Development Co. (Thailand), increasing its stake to approximately 56.7%.

items.headline: L&T extends deadline for L&T Metro Rail (Hyderabad) stake disposal to September 30, 2026
items.summary: L&T extended the completion deadline for its stake disposal in L&T Metro Rail (Hyderabad) to September 30, 2026.

items.headline:
Hero MotoCorp announces 
₹3,200 crore investments in Andhra Pradesh
items.summary:
Hero MotoCorp announced investments exceeding 
₹3,200 crore in Andhra Pradesh, including a 
₹750 crore Global Parts Centre in Tirupati.

items.headline:
BASF India divests entire stake in BASF India Coatings for 
₹230.16 crore
items.summary:
BASF India completed the divestiture of its entire stake in BASF India Coatings Pvt Ltd for 
₹230.16 crore.

items.headline: Polyplex Corporation opts to maintain 51% stake in Polyplex (Thailand), skips tender offer
items.summary: Polyplex Corporation opted not to participate in the tender offer for shares of Polyplex (Thailand) PCL, choosing to maintain its 51% stake.

items.headline:
JSW Infrastructure completes 
₹7,503 crore Qualified Institutional Placement
items.summary:
JSW Infrastructure concluded a Qualified Institutional Placement (QIP) worth

items.summary: Force Motors recorded a 23.5% year-on-year increase in total sales during June 2026.

items.summary: Investors will be closely watching a range of stocks today, including Coal India, Bharti Airtel, NMDC, South Indian Bank, Hero MotoCorp, Max Healthcare, Maruti Suzuki, SBI Life Insurance, Kotak Mahindra Bank, Axis Bank, SBI, HDFC Life Insurance, InterGlobe Aviation, HCL Technologies, Shriram Finance, Bajaj Auto, ONGC, Infosys, Wipro, Eicher Motors, Sun Pharmaceutical, Glenmark Pharmaceuticals, Lupin, CSM Technologies, Tata Technologies, V-Mart, Indian Bank, Force Motors, Dhanlaxmi Bank, Medi Assist Healthcare Services, JTL Industries, Goodyear India, SEPC, Route Mobile, Devyani International, L&T, TVS Supply Chain Solutions, Embassy Developments, Mobavenue AI Tech, JSW Infrastructure, Satin Creditcare Network, IOL Chemicals and Pharmaceuticals, Central Depository Services (India), Shree Cement, BASF India, Polyplex Corporation, L&T Finance, Alembic Pharmaceuticals, Paramount Communications Ltd, Gujarat Energy, Lloyds Enterprises, Chembond Material Technologies, Punjab & Sind Bank, and Tamilnad Mercantile Bank.
